CONTENT.Personal life: Born in France, Etienne is of Haitian descent.
CONTENT.External links: Yoann Étienne at SoccerwayAS Monaco Profile
CONTENT.Professional career: On 6 April 2018, Etienne signed his first professional contract with AS Monaco FC for three years. On 16 June 2018, he was loaned to Cercle Brugge for the 2018-19 season. Etienne made his professional debut in a 0-0 Belgian First Division A tie with Sint-Truiden on 28 July 2018. On 5 October 2021, he transferred to the Ligue 1 club Lorient.

SUMMARY: Yoann Étienne (born 19 May 1997) is a French professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Lorient.
